headline: From TikTok Viral to Whole Foods Shelf in 18 Months -- Down from Four-to-Six Years: 5W Releases the F&B Retail Acceleration Playbook 2026
summary: 5W, the AI communications firm, today released The TikTok-to-Whole-Foods Playbook 2026, a strategic guide for food and beverage founders and CMOs running the compressed path from creator-led launch to national retail distribution.

headline: The Hormuz Reopening Trade: These 20 Large-Cap Stocks Still Haven't Caught Up To Pre-War Levels
summary: Wall Street marched near records as the Strait of Hormuz reopens and oil sinks. Yet 20 large caps, from Abbott to Alibaba, still trade below their pre-war close.

raw.headline: The Hormuz Reopening Trade: These 20 Large-Cap Stocks Still Haven't Caught Up To Pre-War Levels
raw.summary: Wall Street marched near records as the Strait of Hormuz reopens and oil sinks. Yet 20 large caps, from Abbott to Alibaba, still trade below their pre-war close.

headline: Electronic Arts launches EA Advertising, a new way for brands to advertise 'directly into gameplay'
summary: Electronic Arts announced EA Advertising, a new way for brands to connect with fans through its portfolio of games, from stadium signs to custom content.
